title: ricinus communis subvar. rutilans
intro: Ricinus communis subvar. rutilans is a variant of the Ricinus communis plant, commonly known as the castor oil plant. The castor oil plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of ricinoleic acid, an unsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of castor oil plant preparations include potential relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as improved skin and hair health. Castor oil can be obtained through cold-pressing the seeds of the plant and is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, salves, and oils, for topical application.
